name: tailwind-v4-tokens
description: Tailwind CSS v4 theming knowledge for token-first themes, dark mode, @theme, and migration reviews.

interface.shortDescription: Review Tailwind v4 themes and token wiring.
interface.longDescription: Tailwind CSS v4 theming knowledge for agents: @theme vs :root, token-first dark mode with @theme inline, spacing-scale shadowing, @apply in scoped styles, and v3 migration.
defaultPrompt: Review this Tailwind v4 theme setup.
